ItacPersonItem.Notes: After his degree in medicine at the University of Padua, he turned to the studying and teaching of philosophy. For more details, see his biography by Cesare Vasoli, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
